display.purpose: Page titles, section headers, hero headlines. Noto Serif Variable. One per major view.

body.purpose: Paragraphs, descriptions, form labels, table cells. Nunito Sans Variable. Max 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Badges, timestamps, status indicators, micro-copy. Nunito Sans Variable. Uppercase only for status badges.

shadows.name: ambient-card
shadows.purpose: Cards containing active work — forms, todo lists, editable content. Diffuse lift with hairline edge.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Focus-visible states on buttons, inputs, and interactive elements. Neutral gray.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, active).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Quick feedback: button presses, checkbox toggles.

motion.name: duration-normal
motion.purpose: Standard transitions: hover backgrounds, border color shifts.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main call-to-action. Vivid indigo, pill-shaped, 36px height. Used for save, submit, create, and primary navigation.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; flex-shrink: 0; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 2.825rem; border: 1px solid transparent; background-clip: padding-box; font-family: 'Nunito Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); outline: none; user-select: none; height: 2.25rem; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; background: oklch(0.457 0.24 277.023); color: oklch(0.962 0.018 272.314); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.457 0.24 277.023) 80%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-priority actions, navigation, filtering. Transparent at rest, warm ash on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; flex-shrink: 0; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 2.825rem; border: 1px solid transparent; background-clip: padding-box; font-family: 'Nunito Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); outline: none; user-select: none; height: 2.25rem; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.967 0.001 286.375); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.3); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Container for active work. Fully rounded, near-white background, ambient shadow for editable content. Flat for static info.
components.html:
Event Details

Manage your event settings here.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 2.825rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); padding: 1.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08), 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-card-header { display: grid; align-items: start; gap: 0.375rem; padding-bottom: 1.5rem; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Noto Serif Variable', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); margin: 0; } .ds-card-content { font-family: 'Nunito Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Pill-shaped text field. Fog background at 50% opacity, ring border on focus. 36px height for touch targets.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; min-width: 0; height: 2.25rem; border-radius: 2.225rem; border: 1px solid transparent; background: oklch(0.922 0 0 / 0.5); padding: 0 0.75rem; font-family: 'Nunito Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); transition: color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.3); background: oklch(0.922 0 0); } .ds-input:disabled { pointer-events: none; cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Compact status indicator. Pill-shaped, 20px height. Used for event status, priority, and category labels.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; height: 1.25rem; width: fit-content; flex-shrink: 0; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.25rem; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 2.225rem; border: 1px solid transparent; padding: 0 0.5rem; font-family: 'Nunito Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); background: oklch(0.457 0.24 277.023); color: oklch(0.962 0.018 272.314); } .ds-badge:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.3); }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Header or sidebar navigation. Plain text at rest, warm ash background on hover, vivid indigo when active.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; border-radius: 2.825rem; font-family: 'Nunito Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); text-decoration: none; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); outline: none; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: oklch(0.967 0.001 286.375); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { border: 1px solid oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.3); } .ds-nav-link--active { color: oklch(0.457 0.24 277.023); background: transparent; } .ds-nav-link--active:hover { background: oklch(0.967 0.001 286.375); }

narrative.overview: This system embodies the quiet authority of a perfectly organized kitchen pass. Every surface is clean, every zone has a purpose, and nothing is frantic. The visual language is composed under pressure: surfaces stay flat and readable, accent color is deployed with surgical precision, and typography pairs the warmth of a serif heading with the legibility of a humanist sans. The overall density is moderate-to-high — this is a tool for professionals who need to scan fast and act faster. The system rejects generic SaaS templates, consumer-party aesthetics, and bloated enterprise dashboards. Every decision prioritizes scannability and trust over decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Pill-shaped everything — no sharp corners, but nothing playful either
One accent voice: vivid indigo used sparingly, its rarity is the point
Serif headings for warmth and authority; sans body for speed and clarity
Surfaces are flat at rest; shadows appear only to elevate active work cards
Touch-friendly sizing with no compact variants below 36px height
Dark mode is functional, not cosmetic — tuned for dim ambient light

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The vivid indigo accent appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point — when you see it, you know it means action or importance.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Neutrals Rule
rules.body: Neither #000 nor #fff appear in the palette. Every extreme is tinted: white toward warm ash, black toward ink with subtle warmth.

rules.name: The Serif-Only-For-Display Rule
rules.body: Noto Serif Variable appears exclusively in Display and Headline roles. Never in body text, buttons, navigation, or form inputs. The contrast between serif headings and sans body is intentional — flattening it weakens hierarchy.

rules.name: The No-Shouting Rule
rules.body: Uppercase is forbidden outside of status badges and single-word action labels. Sentence case everywhere else.

rules.name: The Active-Work-Only Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear exclusively on surfaces that hold actionable or editable content. Static information, navigation, and decorative containers remain flat. If a card has no interactive elements inside, it does not get a shadow.

dos: Do use vivid indigo exclusively for primary actions, active states, and status badges. Its scarcity is what makes it meaningful.
Do keep card shadows reserved for surfaces containing active or editable work. Static info stays flat.
Do use Noto Serif Variable for page titles and card headers; Nunito Sans Variable for everything else.
Do ensure touch targets are at least 44px in hurried environments (kitchens, service floors).
Do respect reduced motion — all transitions should be instant or use minimal fade when prefers-reduced-motion is active.
Do use sentence case for all labels, headings, and body copy. Uppercase is for single-word status badges only.
donts: Don't use consumer-party aesthetics — no balloons, confetti, neon brights, or playful illustrations. This is a professional operations tool.
Don't build dashboards overloaded with metrics nobody reads. Every number on screen must earn its place.
Don't use #000 or #fff. Every extreme neutral in the palette is intentionally tinted.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative blur effects. The system is flat and purposeful.
Don't use side-stripe borders (colored left/right borders >1px on cards, alerts, or list items). Use full borders, background tints, or nothing.
Don't use identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly. Vary content presentation by function.
Don't reach for a modal as the first interaction pattern. Exhaust inline and progressive alternatives first.
Don't use em dashes. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, top, left). Use transform and opacity only.
